form.formComment: Last start second last of 8 at Hawkesbury Bm64 on March 17 over 1500m, 4.5 len behind Malabar with 56kg at $7. The run before that came from midfield and scored a big 4.5 len win at this track Mdn-Sw March 2 over 1400m defeating Chasing Quivers with 56.5kg at $1.20. In good hands and a decent chance to bounce.
